title: cyathea dealbata
intro: Cyathea dealbata, also known as the silver fern, is a type of tree fern native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cyathea dealbata include soothing sore throats and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
